scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: sh -c 'files=$(find tests/unit -name "*.test.ts" -print); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo "No unit tests found"; else node --import tsx --test $files; fi'
scripts.test:integration: sh -c 'files=$(find tests/integration -name "*.test.ts" -print); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo "No integration tests found"; else node --import tsx --test $files; fi'
scripts.test:e2e: sh -c 'files=$(find tests/e2e -name "*.test.ts" -print); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo "No e2e tests found"; else node --import tsx --test $files; fi'
